productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Bounce Trainer Navy Blue Sports Shoes
description: Take outdoor training to the next level in these AZ Bounce Trainer shoes from adidas. Constructed for better comfort and cushioning, these mountain sport shoes helps you master rugged terrain. Team these with jeans and a tee for great urban style. Upper SprintSkin upper that reduces the weight of the shoe adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand&rsquo s belief in performance Mesh tongue provides better breathability Padded collar offers better comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Brand name embossed at the back of the collar Midsole Rubber midsole adiPrene insert in the forefoot A molded EVA insole Bounce technology moulded midsole Outsole Non-marking outsole adiWear outsole Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
